name: Reflex Plus Adult Cat Food Canned – Salmon Chunks in Jelly 400g
shortDescription: Full-balanced, salmon protein-containing canned (wet) cat food carefully formulated by cat nutritionists to meet the nutritional requirements of all adult breeds.
description: Reflex Plus Salmon Adult Cat Canned Food, fully -balanced, fish protein-containing cat food Carefully formulated by cat nutritionists to meet the nutritional requirements of all adult breeds. NUTRIENT COMPONENTS Crude Protein (%) – 9.5 Crude Oils & Fats (%) – 5.0 Crude Fiber (%) -0.5 Moisture (%) -80 Crude Ash (%) – 3.0 Vitamin A (Min) -1400 IE/kg Vitamin D3 (Min) -180 IE/kg Iron -8 mg/kg Copper -1.2 mg/kg Iodine -0.21 mg/kg Manganese -1.6 mg/kg Zinc -8.0 mg/kg Selenium -0.02 mg/kg INGREDIENTS: Meat & Animal Derivatives (Salmon 4% min.), Cereals, Minerals. FEEDING RECOMMENDATION: An adult cat (approx. 4kg) requires up to 3 meals per day, where 1 can serves 2 meals. Individual requirements depend on factors like age, breed and activity. Serve at room temperature. Store in a cool, dry place. Not fit for human consumption.
